"'''The Death of Captain Tarpals'''" is an 8-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] featured in [[Star Wars Tales 3|''Star Wars Tales'' 3]] and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 1]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 2]]''. It was written by [[Ryder Windham]], illustrated by [[Tom Fowler]], lettered by [[Vickie Williams]], colored by [[David Nestelle|Dave Nestelle]], and edited by [[David Land|Dave Land]] and [[Peet Janes]].

==Plot summary==
In the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] city of [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]], Chef [[Brass Marshoo]] catches [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] in the kitchen trying to scavenge leftovers. Marshoo prepares to punch Jar Jar just as [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Roos Tarpals/Legends|Roos Tarpals]] comes in to arrest Jar Jar for the very same thing. He puts the handcuffs on Jar Jar and takes him away. Soon after, Tarpals tells Jar Jar that everyone down at the station is calling him "The Death of Captain Tarpals." Suddenly, Tarpals is ambushed by Marshoo and some of his friends, who prepare to beat down Jar Jar as they'd planned. They throw a frying pan at Jar Jar, but he ducks, and it goes flying into his [[Kaadu/Legends|kaadu]], who retaliates with a kick to Marshoo, sending him and his cohorts into a small fountain. Jar Jar revives Tarpals, and asks to be released after taking care of Marshoo. Roos ignores him and takes him to the surface of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], where he shall live for a long time to come.
